description: A single fact is split across two sessions: session-A establishes the library name, session-B establishes the version. Both pieces should be recoverable.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: We decided to use the Zod library for runtime validation in this project.

seed_turns.speaker: assistant
seed_turns.content: Zod is a great choice for TypeScript schema validation.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: We pinned Zod to version 3.22.4 to avoid breaking changes.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: The Zod version 3.22.4 was tested against our schema definitions.

query: which validation library and version are we using
